format: JSONL (one JSON object per line, UTF-8)

schema.domain: Content domain (religious, lexical, constitutional, literary, government, mixed)

sources_detail.bible_nt: New Testament parallel Bible (ebible.org pbb), verse-aligned
sources_detail.broomva_instruct: Broomva instruct-tuning data, parsed from [INST] format, mainly Colombian constitution
sources_detail.americasnlp_2024: AmericasNLP 2024 shared task training data, mixed domains
sources_detail.kwesxyuwe_thematic: 17 KwesxYuwe thematic vocabulary PDFs (body parts, animals, food, etc.)
sources_detail.territorios_narrados: 4 bilingual children books from Territorios Narrados (MinCultura)
sources_detail.adres_health: ADRES health rights pamphlet (bilingual government document)

notes: Two orthographies exist: Traditional (1984, used in Bible) and New (2014, community standard). Not normalized.
Deduplicated by normalized text (lowercase + strip punctuation). ~30% overlap across dictionary sources.
Broomva instruct data parsed from <s>[INST] Traduce de Espanol a Paez: {SPA} [/INST] {NASA} </s> format.

Repair 2026-05: replaced contaminated territorios_narrados and adres_health PDF extraction with layout-aware sentence/paragraph pairs; current repaired counts are 164 Territorios rows and 7 ADRES rows, with AmericasNLP exact metadata/title leaks filtered.
